    Subclasses of AbstractObjectValidatorNoOp in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal

    class  ArrayValidatorNoOp<A,​E>
    An ArrayValidator that ignores subsequent validations due to an incompatible type conversion.

    A BigDecimalPrecisionValidator that does nothing.

    A BigDecimalValidator that does nothing.
